chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 391 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For hearing of Main Case. 3) For hearing of CMA No.4929/2023. 02.09.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, Advocate for Appellant. Mr. Ahmed Imran Dewan, Advocate for Respondents. ________________ Learned counsel submits that since the issue has been settled between the parties, therefore, he does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
